# UMG Resleever Browse Layer

This folder is the human-readable navigation layer for the active resleever.

## Start here
- [`START-HERE.md`](./START-HERE.md)
- [`blocks/INDEX.md`](./blocks/INDEX.md)
- [`sleeves/INDEX.md`](./sleeves/INDEX.md)

## What is here
- `blocks/` = individual blocks in markdown, organized by type
- `sleeves/` = individual sleeves in markdown, with summaries and domain routing notes

The raw JSON still exists elsewhere for compiler/runtime use. This browse layer is just for people.
